title: Using Minikube to Create a Cluster — Create a minikube cluster
text:
To start a minikube cluster:
minikube start
To verify the cluster status:
minikube status
For a complete walkthrough including deploying your first app and exploring the Kubernetes dashboard, see the
Hello Minikube
tutorial.

Tutorial
Deploy an App
.
Learn more about
Cluster Architecture
.
